Em meio aos desafios da juventude, “Anjo Negro” explora as forças que unem e separam, revelando o poder e as consequências da paixão. Gêneros: Romance Elenco: Noah Hadan, Leonardo Braga, Duda Menezes, Éffora Consoli, Nicole Francinee Diretor: Marcus Dartagnãn

programme.desc: 1970. O compulsivo jogador Slipper vê o sequestro do neto de um magnata a salvação de suas dívidas. Quando, junto com seu senhorio e o oportunista Octopus, sequestra BB, sem saber, frustram os planos do crime organizado, que também está atrás da criança. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Uma Aventura Selvagem, (2021)

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Simulação - T01E38
programme.desc: 2007. Chega uma mensagem da Aldeia da Areia sobre o sequestro do Kazekage. Tsunade manda a equipe Kakashi para a aldeia. Kankuro começa a batalha contra os Akatsuki, mas as táticas dos bonecos não funcionam. Seu oponente foi quem desenvolveu essas táticas. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Ponte Tenchi - T01E39
programme.desc: 2007. Os ninjas tentam salvar Kankuro. Vovó Chiyo, perita em veneno, é chamada. Uma tempestade de areia atrasa Naruto, Sakura e Kakashi. Tsunade se preocupa e envia Guy e sua equipe. O akatsuki e Gaara começam o jutsu de selamento e os nove dragões fantasmas. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Nove Caudas Se Liberta - T01E40
programme.desc: 2007. Sakura trata Kankuro, deixando todos espantados com suas mãos firmes. Vovó Chiyo fica emocionada por Tsunade ter enviado sua própria aprendiz e pela determinação de Sakura. Kankuro fornece informações sobre os Akatsuki. Kakashi envia um cão de caça ninja. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Missão Super Secreta Se Inicia - T01E41
programme.sub-title: A Missão Super Secreta Se Inicia
programme.desc: 2007. Pakkun acha o esconderijo dos Akatsuki. Temari recebe ordens para ajudar a proteger a aldeia. Vovó Chiyo se oferece para ficar no lugar de Temari. Naruto e Sakura ficam chocados com a história das bestas de cauda. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Orochimaru Versus Jinchuriki - T01E42
programme.desc: 2008. A equipe Kakashi encontra Itachi Uchiha, de quem sofrera uma amarga derrota no passado. Guy e sua equipe começam a lutar contra um amargo rival, Kisame, que lança um poderoso chakra para subjugar o ninja da folha. Seu jutsu aprisiona Neji, Lee e Tenten. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: As Lágrimas De Sakura - T01E43
programme.desc: 2008. Guy se arrepende ao ver seus três alunos presos. Determinado a parar Kisame, Guy o desafia usando o nunchaku. Sem oxigênio, Tenten vai ficando fraca, e Guy se prepara para usar um jutsu secreto e proibido. Naruto cai no genjutsu de Itachi. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Segredo Da Batalha - T01E44
programme.desc: 2008. Vovó Chiyo e Sakura salvam Naruto do genjutsu de Itachi. Kakashi começa um contra-ataque e exibe toda sua destreza. Guy enfrenta dificuldades contra Kisame, mas o derrota com um poderoso jutsu. Os ninjas da folha conseguem derrotar seu arquiminigo. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: As Consequências Da Traição - T01E45
programme.desc: 2008. Kisame e Itachi parecem ter sido clones cujos poderes foram copiados por um jutsu de personificação. Vovó Chiyo explica a conexão entre a besta de cauda e o jinchuriki. Sakura percebe que Naruto enfrenta o mesmo destino e lágrimas escorrem em seu rosto. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Página Inacabada - T01E46
programme.desc: 2008. As equipes Kakashi e Guy fazem uma pausa. Quando a perseguição recomeça, Kakashi explica a Chiyo que Naruto também é um jinchuriki. Chiyo lamenta ter sido ela que selou o shukaku dentro de Gaara... Gaara é engolfado por uma luz branca. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Infiltração: O Covil Da Cobra! - T01E47
programme.desc: 2008. As equipes Kakashi e Guy chegam ao esconderijo dos akatsuki, mas são parados por uma barreira de cinco selos. Neji usa seu byakugan para localizar os selos e os ninjas destroem a barreira. Naruto tem uma visão chocante. A equipe Guy encara uma armadilha. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Laços - T01E48
programme.desc: 2008. Quebrar a barreira de cinco selos ativa uma armadilha, e a equipe Guy enfrenta cópias idênticas de si mesmos. Deidara e Sasori lutam para se apoderar do jinchuriki. Forçado a seguir Naruto, Kakashi pede que vovó Chiyo e Sakura não façam nada precipitado. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Algo Importante... - T01E49
programme.desc: 2008. A luta entre avó e neto começa. Para derrotar o verdadeiro Sasori dentro do boneco, Hiruko deve ser destruído primeiro. Só a própria avó consegue entender as armadilhas complexas de Sasori, mas é Sakura que deve dar o golpe final. Que estratégia usarão? programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A História Do Álbum Ilustrado - T01E50
programme.desc: 2008. Chiyo e Sakura expõem Sasori, que não envelheceu nada nos últimos vinte anos. Chiyo fica mais chocada com o segundo boneco que Sasori revela. Sasori foi quem planejou o desaparecimento do kazecage. Uma equipe ninja se dirige a um certo local. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Reencontro - T01E51
programme.desc: 2008. Sakura fica cercada por uma nuvem de veneno e usa um papel bomba para se livrar da fumaça. Ela tenta capturar Sasori para forçá-lo a dar informações sobre Orochimaru, invocando dois bonecos para esta batalha. Naruto e Kakashi ainda perseguem Deidara! programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Poder De Uchiha - T01E52
programme.desc: 2008. Os bonecos criados de humanos podem comandar o jutsu que o humano usava enquanto vivo. Assim, o boneco do terceiro kazekage converte chakras em poderes magnéticos. Chiyo e Sakura se protegem, Sasori faz um ataque implacável. Sakura toma uma decisão. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Título - T01E53
programme.desc: 2008. Sakura revida o ataque da areia de ferro. Ela rapidamente começa a ler os padrões de ataque do Sasori, que se prepara para usar seu chakra. O ataque da areia de ferro penetra o espaço, Sakura é atingida na mão e é infectada pelo veneno! programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Pesadelo - T02E54
programme.desc: 2008. Sakura destrói o boneco do terceiro kazekage graças a um antídoto que ela tomou e que funciona durante cerca de três minutos. Chiyo e Sakura decidem derrotar Sasori nesse prazo. Sasori usa seu último trunfo. Naruto e Kakashi planejam capturar Deidara. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Vento - T02E55
programme.desc: 2008. Sakura e Vovó Chiyo derrotam Sasori, mas ele acaba revivendo. Chiyo invoca bonecos com a técnica do ataque branco secreto, e Sasori aplica seu ataque vermelho secreto. O antídoto de Sakura perde efeito, mas ela e Chiyo iniciam uma decisiva batalha final! programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Contorção - T02E56
programme.desc: 2008. Vovó Chiyo usa o último antídoto em Sakura. Sasori tenta pôr fim à vida de Vovó Chiyo, mas ela revida e o derrota. Sakura é atingida em um lugar vital, e a única coisa que pode salvá-la é um jutsu que a Vovó Chiyo criou uma vez para Sasori. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Despertar Do Sono Eterno - T02E57
programme.desc: 2008. Os ninjas da equipe Guy se preocupam com o resultado da luta de Sakura e Vovó Chiyo enquanto enfrentam suas cópias, que permanecem firmes! Naruto segue Deidara, que se apoderou de Gaara. A preparação para a nova técnica de Kakashi está em andamento! programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Solidão - T02E58
programme.desc: 2008. Sakura corre para achar Naruto com Vovó Chiyo, sofrendo envenenada. Kakashi revela seu mangekyo sharingan, um poderoso jutsu que transporta tudo o que o olho pode ver para outra dimensão. Naruto finalmente consegue salvar Gaara, mas fica enfurecido ... programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Um Novo Inimigo - T02E59
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto perde o controle e o espírito da Raposa de Nove Caudas assume o comando. Kakashi consegue suprimir a Raposa de Nove Caudas. Deidara descobre a derrota de Sasori. A equipe Guy cerca Deidara, que tenta se explodir junto com os ninjas da folha! programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Impermanência - T02E60
programme.desc: 2008. Vovó Chiyo realiza o jutsu de ressuscitação em Gaara. Gaara acorda cercado por Naruto e os outros e também por uma multidão de ninjas da areia. Percebendo a verdade por trás do jutsu de ressuscitação, todos demonstram seu respeito por Chiyo. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Contato - T02E61
programme.desc: 2008. Gaara e seus salvadores retornam à Aldeia de Areia. Após visitar o túmulo de Vovó Chiyo, Naruto e os ninjas da Folha têm que partir. Deidara aparece ferido na frente de Zetsu e Tobi. Na Aldeia da Folha, alguém tenta infiltrar um garoto na equipe Kakashi! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Companheiro De Equipe! - T02E62
programme.desc: 2008. Kakashi é hospitalizado devido à tensão causada por seu mangekyo sharinga. Apesar dos apelos de Shizune para enviar outra equipe, Tsunade afirma que enviará a equipe Kakashi para fazer o trabalho. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Os Dois Reis - T02E63
programme.desc: 2008. Sai diz que ele e Naruto se encontrarão de novo e desaparece. Homura e Koharu dizem a Tsunade que Naruto não deve ser enviado em missões envolvendo a Akatsuki. Tsunade não concorda, então eles exigem que ela adicione um ninja recomendado por Danzo. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Sinal De Fogo Preto - T02E64
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto fica enfurecido ao saber que Sai o atacou para testá-lo. Tsunade, Jiraiya, Yamatoe e Shizune se reunem no quarto de Kakashi. Jiraiya expõe o comportamento despreocupado de Naruto. Sai recebe um envelope misterioso do setor operacional da fundação. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Presa Na Escuridão - T02E65
programme.desc: 2008. A nova equipe Kakashi segue em direção à ponte Tenchi. Quando Sai mostra seu desprezo por Sasuke, o antagonismo com Naruto aumenta. Yamato decide que eles passarão a noite em uma pousada para tentar melhorar as relações entre os membros de sua equipe. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Almas Ressuscitadas - T02E66
programme.desc: 2008. Sakura vê Sai trabalhando em uma pintura abstrata e encontra um livro de desenhos incomum no meio das coisas dele. Enquanto vão em direção à ponte Tenchi, eles se mantêm atentos contra qualquer emboscada. Yamato orienta sua equipe caso uma luta aconteça. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden - T02E67
programme.desc: 2008. Yamato faz uma simulação para avaliar as habilidades e técnicas de luta da equipe Kakashi. Sai abandona Naruto para concluir a missão simulada. Naruto fica uma fera e declara que, se é para ajudar a salvar o Sasuke, ele ficará na mesma equipe que Sai. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Momento De Despertar - T02E68
programme.desc: 2008. O dia para capturar o espião finalmente chega. Yamato assume a aparência de Sasori e espera que o espião apareça. Para a surpresa de todos, o espião era Kabuto. De repente, Orochimaru aparece. A situação muda, e a equipe Kakashi se encontra em risco. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Desespero - T02E69
programme.desc: 2008. Ao enfrentar Orochimaru, Naruto liberta o poder da Raposa de Nove Caudas. Quando Yamato vê a quarta cauda, lembra do que Jiraiya falou. Yamato deveria suprimir o chakra que afetaria o corpo de Naruto. O ninjutsu secreto de Yamato se torna aparente. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Ressonância - T02E70
programme.desc: 2008. Quando a terceira cauda aparece, Naruto só consegue ver Orochimaru. Ele está cego até para seus companheiros de equipe. Sakura é atingida e cai inconsciente. Sai finalmente segue para sua missão secreta. Naruto libera a quarta cauda proibida. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Meu Amigo - T02E71
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto perde a consciência e é tomado por impulsos destrutivos. Os clones de Sai e Yamato testemunham uma batalha horrível entre Orochimaru e Naruto. O poder e a aparência de Naruto se tornam demoníacos, como se ele estivesse se transformando na Raposa. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Uma Ameaça Se Aproxima - T02E72
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto, mesmo transformado, não desiste de trazer Sasuke para casa. Sakura é ferida por Naruto, mas consegue usar seu ninjutsu para conter a agitação da Raposa de Nove Caudas. Orochimaru tenta deixar o campo de batalha, mas é confrontado por Sai. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Invasão Da Akatsuki - T02E73
programme.desc: 2008. Orochimaru aceita levar Sai para o esconderijo. Yamato consegue parar a agitação de Naruto, mas os ferimentos de Naruto são graves. Quando ele volta a si, Yamato revela a ele e Sakura que Sai foi embora e que Danzo pode estar conspirando algo terrível. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Sob O Céu Estrelado - T02E74
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto e sakura ficam chocados quando descobrem que Danzo planeja trabalhar com Orochimaru. A equipe Dakashi é forçada a fazer uma pausa. Orochimaru percebe que está sendo seguido pelo clone de Yamato e decide usar Sai para despistar seus perseguidores. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Oração Do Velho Monge - T02E75
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto fica chocado ao saber que foi o responsável pelos ferimentos de Sakura. Yamato diz que ele irá suprimir o poder da Raposa de Nove Caudas com seu ninjutsu. Sakura pergunta sobre uma história estranha que ela viu no livro de desenhos de Sai. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Próximo Passo - T02E76
programme.desc: 2008. Sai estremece quando encontra Sasuke no esconderijo de Orochimaru. Sai ficará com Orochimaru em troca de algumas informações valiosas, mas ficará sob prisão domiciliar até que possa ser de confiança. Quando fica sozinho, sai e começa a procurar um livro. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Escalada De Prata - T02E77
programme.desc: 2008. A equipe Kakashi consegue achar Sai. Eles começam a interrogá-lo sobre os planos de Danzo, e Sai conta tudo. Sakura descobre, através das atitudes de Sai, alguns pontos fortes em seu subconsciente e assinala para Sai as contradições em seu comportamento. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Julgamento - T02E78
programme.desc: 2008. Kabuto faz um ataque de surpresa na equipe Kakashi para levar Sai de volta. Com as informações que conseguem através de Kabuto, capturado, a procura por Sasuke está perto do fim. Naruto e Sakura correm para achar Sasuke. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Un Grito Interrompido - T02E79
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto procura por Sasuke. Sai lembra que teve um irmão mais velho e consegue terminar o retrato inacabado. Antes de desaparecer após um ataque de Orochimaru, Sai promete que salvará Sasuke. Yamato descobre uma verdade entre os pertences de Sai. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Últimas Palavras - T02E80

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Notícias Tristes - T02E81
programme.desc: 2008. A equipe Kakashi tem seu desejo atendido ao reencontrar Sasuke, mas Sasuke não mudou. Seu objetivo é se vingar de seu irmão mais velho, Itachi. programme.title: 2023. Apesar de sua surpreendente desvantagem, Yugi provoca PaniK destemidamente: Vou acabar com você em três turnos. Yugi está blefando ou tem a vantagem nesta batalha de inteligência? Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E15

programme.title: 2023. Kaiba desce até o reino para enfrentar Pegasus! Será que Kaiba mudou após sua batalha com Yugi ou ainda é o mesmo duelista impiedoso? A resposta jaz numa batalha entre o Dragão Branco de Olhos Azuis de Kaiba e o Dragão Negro de Olhos Vermelhos de Joey! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E16

programme.title: 2023. A gangue do duelista americano nº 1, Bandit Keith, sequestra Joey para uma caverna secreta com um cemitério como campo de jogo. Enquanto Yugi e seus amigos procuram por ele, Joey enfrenta monstros zumbis que ficam mais forte ao saírem de seus túmulos! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E17

programme.title: 2023. A última tentativa de Joey, sua carta da sorte Mago do Tempo, fracassa contra os monstros zumbis de Bandit Keith. Ao passo que sua maré de sorte acaba, será que suas habilidades melhoradas e amor por sua irmã o inspirarão para a vitória? Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E18

programme.title: 2023. Presos na caverna labirinto, Yugi e seus amigos encontram uma saída alternativa, mas a porta é vigiada pelos Irmãos Paradoxo, irmãos de Pegasus. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E19

programme.title: 2023. Yugi e Joey combinam forças e se defendem dos monstros de seus oponentes, mas as coisas logo mudarão, já que os Irmãos Paradoxo invocam o todo-poderoso Guardião do Portão, um monstro que reflete qualquer ataque! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E20

programme.title: 2023. Yugi e Joey liberam cada um o seu monstro mais forte, Caveira Invocada e Dragão Negro de Olhos Vermelhos, mas a força deles perde a imponência, comparada ao tremendo poder do Guardião do Portão. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E21

programme.title: 2023. Usando a mágica do Olho do Milênio, Pegasus prende a alma de Mokuba dentro de uma carta bem na frente de Kaiba! Para conseguir o direito de desafiar Pegasus, Kaiba precisa derrotar Yugi e pegar suas estrelas primeiro. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E22

programme.title: 2023. Kaiba invoca Dragão Supremo de Olhos Azuis, o monstro mais forte do jogo, a fusão de três Dragões Brancos de Olhos Azuis! Yugi perdeu seus poderosos Monstros de Duelo, mas um duelista verdadeiro nunca desiste! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E23

programme.title: 2023. Yugi começa a tecer uma estratégia para destruir o Dragão Supremo de Olhos Azuis, mas tem que decidir se vai clamar vitória ou poupar a vida de Kaiba. O coração de Yugi está dividido. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E24

programme.title: 2023. Tendo perdido suas estrelas para Kaiba, assim como sua única chance de salvar seu avô, Yugi está em estado de choque. Será que Téa pode fazer Yugi recobrar os sentidos ganhando as estrelas de Mai, ensinando o coração do duelista a Yugi? Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E25

programme.title: 2023. Yugi e seus amigos entram no castelo e veem que Kaiba está pronto para duelar contra Pegasus, e a alma de Mokuba continua com um futuro incerto! O poder do Olho do Milênio dá a Pegasus a habilidade de ler a mente das pessoas. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E26

programme.title: 2023. Kaiba é impotente diante do deck Mundo Toon de Pegasus e de sua habilidade de ler mentes. Quando o duelo acaba, Pegasus prende a alma de Kaiba em uma carta, como com o avô de Yugi e Mokuba! Yugi está farto! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E27

programme.title: 2023. É a noite da véspera da batalha final, e muitas criaturas estão agitadas! Yugi jura derrotar Pegasus pelo bem de seu avô. Tristan lidera uma equipe de reconhecimento para descobrir os segredos de Pegasus. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E28

programme.title: 2023. Diante do olhar sufocante de Pegasus, Yugi se distrai do duelo com Mai. Após cometer erros de tática bobos e deixar Mai obter uma vantagem enorme com seu Dragão de Estimação da Harpia, será que Yugi recuperará o foco ou sucumbirá à pressão intensa? Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E29

programme.title: 2023. Mai se recuperou de sua derrota anterior para Joey, tornando-se uma duelista melhor. Será que Yugi aprendeu com sua derrota para Kaiba, ou o sentimento de derrota ainda pesa em seu coração? A resposta está nas cartas! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E30

programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E31

programme.sub-title: Yugi vs. Pegasus Partida do Milênio, Parte 4

programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E40

programme.title: 2023. Yugi e seus amigos retornam do Reino dos Duelistas e conhecem uma jovem chamada Rebecca, que exige que o avô de Yugi lhe devolva o Dragão Branco de Olhos Azuis! Ela veio reivindicar a carta que o avô de Yugi roubou do avô dela muitos anos atrás! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E41

programme.title: 2023. Rebecca está enganada em acreditar que o avô de Yugi roubou o Dragão Branco de Olhos Azuis do avô dela. Yugi precisa defender o Dragão Branco de Olhos Azuis para ensinar a ela que o que conta não é o poder das cartas, mas o coração delas. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E42

programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E43

programme.title: 2023. A missão para resgatar Kaiba continua com uma ajudinha de... Mai? Mas será que Yugi e seus amigos se adaptarão a um mundo virtual em que as regras e estratégias mudam a toda hora? Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E44

programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E45

programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E46

programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E47

programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E48

programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E49

programme.title: 2023. Um cartomante arcano rouba o Enigma do Milênio, e Yugi precisa defendê-lo em um duelo para recuperá-lo! No entanto, não se trata de um simples advinho. Será que Yugi consegue remontar o Enigma do Milênio e salvar o espírito antes que tudo seja engolido pelas chamas? Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E02

programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E03

No entanto, a busca deles é interrompida pelo duelista dançarino Johnny Steps e seus monstros do rock! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E04

Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E05

Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima

programme.sub-title: Yugi vs. Caçador Raro, Parte 2: Encarando Exodia

Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima

Yugi tem que vencer esse duelo ou perderá muito mais que seu Mago Negro! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima

programme.title: 2023. É Mago Negro contra Mago Negro! No entanto, enquanto Yugi só controla um Mago Negro, Arkana tem três em seu deck! programme.title: 2023. Para encarar o Mago Negro de Arkana, Yugi tira um coelho da cartola: a Pequena Maga Negra! É a batalha dos sexos, para determinar o verdadeiro mestre dos magos! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima

programme.desc: When a new global ice-age threatens the world, a climatologist tries to figure out a way to save humanity, and attempts to get to his young son in New York. Starring Dennis Quaid, Jake Gyllenhaal, Ian Holm.

programme.title: Eraserhead
programme.desc: When Henry discovers that a fling with Mary X leaves her pregnant, he marries the expectant mother and has her move in with him. Things take a strange turn when the couples baby turns out to be a bizarre lizard-like creature that wont stop wailing. Starring Jack Nance, Charlotte Stewart, Allen Joseph.

programme.title: Christiane F
programme.desc: In the 1970s Berlin, an aimless teenager who lives with her single mother falls in with a drug dealer. Starring Thomas Haustein, Natja Brunckhorst, Jens Kuphal.

programme.title: The Girlfriend Experience
programme.desc: Bria must take matters into her own hands as she avoids both the law and Donald.

programme.title: Minx
programme.desc: At the Minx International launch party, Doug confronts Constance, while Joyce starts to lose control of her magazine; Shelly and Lenny look toward an uncertain future.

programme.title: Nurse Jackie
programme.desc: While searching for hidden drugs, Frank throws his back out; Jackie finds a new hiding place; Grace calls out Jackie on her lying prowess; Zoey confronts Prentiss about his dissatisfaction; Mia and Kevin have an announcement.

programme.title: Nurse Jackie
programme.desc: Jackies fake identity is compromised; Frank moves in; Antoinette badgers Jackie about her sobriety; Prentiss plans a night out with Zoey.

programme.title: Weeds
programme.desc: Nancy gets an ominous message from Guillermo; Celia finds she has value; Andy takes Shane to live with Nancys sister; Silas and Doug discover how difficult their task will be.

programme.title: Weeds
programme.desc: Nancy gets a surprise visit from Jill; Nancys bodyguard is missing; Celias micromanaging gets her sent back to the U.S.; Silas and Doug seek law-enforcement approval.

programme.title: Hector and the Search for Happiness
programme.desc: A search by a disillusioned psychiatrist for the key to his happiness takes him around the world on a journey. Starring Simon Pegg, Toni Collette, Rosamund Pike.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Looking to share a quiet evening out with Abby, Will and his date are abducted en route to the restaurant by a gang leader who faces certain death without their help; upon learning the abductors identity, Magnus ceases all attempts at rescue.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Dr Helen Magnus, a 158-year-old English scientist, seeks out extraordinarily-powered creatures, known as Abnormals.

programme.title: Upside Down
programme.desc: Though it is forbidden, a man devises a way to reunite with a long-lost love from the twin world that sits just above his own. Starring Kirsten Dunst, Jim Sturgess, Timothy Spall.

programme.title: Raise Your Voice
programme.desc: A small-town teenager (Hilary Duff) defies her father (David Keith) and heads to Los Angeles to study at a performing arts school. Starring Hilary Duff, Oliver James, David Keith.

programme.title: Unsung Hero
programme.desc: David Smallbone moves his family to the United States to search for a brighter future. Struggling to make ends meet, he soon realizes the talents of his children, who go on to become two of the most successful acts in contemporary Christian music. Starring Joel Smallbone, Daisy Betts, Kirrilee Berger.

programme.title: Florence Foster Jenkins
programme.desc: In 1940s New York, a man (Hugh Grant) goes to extreme lengths to make sure his wife (Meryl Streep) never finds out that shes an awful opera singer. Starring Meryl Streep, Hugh Grant, Simon Helberg.

programme.title: Cairo Time
programme.desc: During a vacation in Egypt, an unexpected love affair arises between a magazine editor (Patricia Clarkson) and her husbands former colleague (Alexander Siddig). Starring Patricia Clarkson, Alexander Siddig, Elena Anaya.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The resourceful detective (Robert Downey Jr.) and his astute partner, Dr. Watson (Jude Law), meet a powerful criminal, a devotee of black magic who arises from his grave. Starring Robert Downey, Jude Law, Rachel McAdams.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: A Game of Shadows
programme.desc: The murder of Austrias crown prince leads Holmes (Robert Downey Jr.), Watson (Jude Law) and a Gypsy (Noomi Rapace) to a showdown with an evil genius named Moriarty (Jared Harris). Starring Robert Downey, Jude Law, Noomi Rapace.

programme.title: Outlander: Blood of my Blood
programme.desc: After the death of Red Jacob, a new Laird of Clan MacKenzie must be chosen and both of his sons, Colum and Dougal, vie for the title; at the Gathering, Brian Fraser and Ellen MacKenzie meet and are struck by their strong connection.

programme.title: Bagman
programme.desc: A father faces a childhood threat that resurfaces suddenly. He battles his deepest fear, not for himself, but to protect his family from the sinister danger. Starring Sam Claflin, Antonia Thomas, William Hope.

programme.title: At First Light
programme.desc: A close encounter with mysterious lights sends two teens on the run after one discovers she has extraordinary but dangerous powers. Starring Stefanie Scott, Theodore Pellerin, Said Taghmaoui.

programme.title: Grey Gardens
programme.desc: Former socialites Edith Bouvier Beale and daughter Edie, 56, become recluses in a decrepit New York mansion.

programme.title: The Sweet Hereafter
programme.desc: A lawyer (Ian Holm) seeks input from parents who lost children in a Canadian bus crash that claimed 14 lives. Starring Ian Holm, Sarah Polley, Bruce Greenwood.

programme.title: Kalinga (Care)
programme.desc: The stories of several Filipina caregivers and nannies in Vancouver, that bear witness to their sacrifices as they struggle to reunite with their children and families.

programme.title: Whale
programme.desc: A young boy is sent to live with his grandparents in a remote indigenous community. Starring Timmy Masso, Grace George, Joe Martin.

programme.title: Ballerina
programme.desc: A look at the Australian Ballets first aboriginal dancer and her impact on the industry. Featuring interviews, dance sequences, and archive footage that showcases how Ella remains grounded in her own culture while performing.

programme.title: Superman II
programme.desc: The Man of Steel (Christopher Reeve) gets serious with Lois Lane (Margot Kidder) and fights three Krypton outcasts in league with Lex Luthor (Gene Hackman). Starring Christopher Reeve, Margot Kidder, Gene Hackman.

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: The Caped Crusader (Michael Keaton) saves dismal Gotham City and gorgeous Vicki Vale (Kim Basinger) from the freaky Joker (Jack Nicholson). Starring Jack Nicholson, Michael Keaton, Kim Basinger.

programme.title: Hulk
programme.desc: Bruce Banner, a genetics researcher with a tragic past, suffers an accident that causes him to transform into a raging green monster when he gets angry. Starring Eric Bana, Jennifer Connelly, Sam Elliott.

programme.title: Wonder Woman
programme.desc: After leaving her island for the first time, Wonder Woman discovers her full powers and true destiny while fighting alongside men in a war to end all wars. Starring Gal Gadot, Chris Pine, Connie Nielsen.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
programme.desc: Under the watchful eye of mentor Tony Stark, high school student Peter Parker starts to embrace his newfound identity as Spider-Man to battle the evil Vulture. Starring Tom Holland, Michael Keaton, Robert Downey.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: A demon raised from infancy after being conjured by and rescued from the Nazis, grows up to become a defender against the forces of darkness. Starring Ron Perlman, John Hurt, Selma Blair.

programme.title: The Shape of Water
programme.desc: Elisa is a mute, isolated woman who works in a hidden, high-security government laboratory. Her life changes forever when she discovers the labs classified secret -- a mysterious, scaled creature from South America that lives in a water tank. Starring Sally Hawkins, Michael Shannon, Richard Jenkins.

programme.title: Splice
programme.desc: An experiment goes horribly wrong when two scientists (Adrien Brody, Sarah Polley) use human DNA to create a hybrid creature. Starring Adrien Brody, Sarah Polley, Delphine Chaneac.

programme.title: Running on Empty
programme.desc: Mort discovers he has less than a year to live. After his fiance leaves him, he meets Kate on a dating service that matches people by their death dates, all while being stalked by a crazy pimp. Starring Keir Gilchrist, Lucy Hale, Francesca Eastwood.

programme.title: Barbarian
programme.desc: A young woman discovers the rental home she booked is already occupied by a stranger. Against her better judgment, she decides to spend the night but soon discovers theres a lot more to fear than just an unexpected house guest. Starring Georgina Campbell, Bill Skarsgård, Justin Long.

programme.title: 28 Weeks Later
programme.desc: As the U.S. Army tries to restore order, a carrier of rage virus enters London and reinfects the populace. Starring Robert Carlyle, Rose Byrne, Jeremy Renner.

programme.title: The Nut Job
programme.desc: A mischievous squirrel and his sidekick assemble a ragtag animal crew to get inside their towns nut shop and steal enough food for the winter. Starring Will Arnett, Brendan Fraser, Liam Neeson.

programme.title: The Nut Job 2: Nutty by Nature
programme.desc: Surly the squirrel and his animal pals find out that the corrupt mayor of Oakton plans to bulldoze their beloved park. Hoping to save the place they call home, the gang joins forces with a cute mouse who happens to be a fierce master of kung fu. Starring Will Arnett, Katherine Heigl, Maya Rudolph.

programme.title: The Boxtrolls
programme.desc: A boy (Isaac Hempstead-Wright) and his new friend (Elle Fanning) hatch a plan to save a community of mischievous cavern-dwellers from the villainous townsman (Ben Kingsley) who plans to exterminate them. Starring Isaac Hempstead-Wright, Elle Fanning, Ben Kingsley.

programme.title: Gnomeo and Juliet
programme.desc: Love-struck garden gnomes (James McAvoy, Emily Blunt) become part of a feud between rival neighbors in Stratford-Upon-Avon, Shakespeares birthplace. Starring James McAvoy, Emily Blunt, Michael Caine.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves
programme.desc: The archer and his Moorish companion join Sherwood Forest outlaws to fight against the sheriff of Nottingham, who desires to possess Maid Marian. Starring Kevin Costner, Morgan Freeman, Mary Elizabeth Mastrantonio.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: When Captain James Hook kidnaps his children, an adult Peter Pan must return to Neverland and reclaim his youthful spirit in order to challenge his old enemy. Starring Dustin Hoffman, Robin Williams, Julia Roberts.

programme.title: Finding Neverland
programme.desc: Writer J.M. Barrie (Johnny Depp) befriends a widow (Kate Winslet) and her four sons who inspire him to create the character Peter Pan. Starring Johnny Depp, Kate Winslet, Julie Christie.

programme.title: Lion
programme.desc: Accidentally separated from his family as a child, Saroo Brierley returns to India 25 years later to find them. Starring Dev Patel, Rooney Mara, David Wenham.

programme.title: Outlander: Blood of my Blood
programme.desc: After the death of Red Jacob, a new Laird of Clan MacKenzie must be chosen and both of his sons, Colum and Dougal, vie for the title; at the Gathering, Brian Fraser and Ellen MacKenzie meet and are struck by their strong connection.

programme.title: The Other Boleyn Girl
programme.desc: Family ambition pits British sisters Anne (Natalie Portman) and Mary (Scarlett Johansson) Boleyn against each other for the affections of King Henry VIII. Starring Natalie Portman, Scarlett Johansson, Eric Bana.

programme.title: Incendies
programme.desc: A womans last request sends her twin children to the Middle East to find their roots. Starring Lubna Azabal, Melissa Desormeaux-Poulin, Maxim Gaudette.

programme.title: Inside
programme.desc: A high-end art thief becomes trapped inside a luxury, high-tech penthouse in New Yorks Times Square after his heist doesnt go as planned. Locked inside with nothing but priceless works of art, he must use all his cunning and invention to survive. Starring Willem Dafoe, Gene Bervoets, Eliza Stuyck.

programme.title: On the Waterfront
programme.desc: A conscience-stricken ex-boxer (Marlon Brando) stands up to a corrupt union boss after unwittingly participating in a fellow longshoremans murder. Starring Marlon Brando, Eva Marie Saint, Karl Malden.

programme.title: Roman Holiday
programme.desc: A young princess (Audrey Hepburn), tired of her constraints, runs off with a U.S. newsman (Gregory Peck) in Rome. Starring Gregory Peck, Audrey Hepburn, Eddie Albert.

programme.title: A Room With a View
programme.desc: An English miss (Helena Bonham-Carter) tours 1907 Florence, Italy, with her cousin (Maggie Smith) and meets a soulmate (Julian Sands). Starring Helena Bonham Carter, Maggie Smith, Julian Sands.

programme.title: The Talented Mr. Ripley
programme.desc: A young man (Matt Damon) travels to 1950s Italy and begins to assume the identity of a playboy (Jude Law) he was hired to bring back to the United States. Starring Matt Damon, Gwyneth Paltrow, Jude Law.

programme.title: Death in Venice
programme.desc: Music by Gustav Mahler accompanies the tale of a composer (Dirk Bogarde) who adores a beautiful youth (Bjorn Andresen) in cholera-ridden Venice. Starring Dirk Bogarde, Bjorn Andresen, Silvana Mangano.

programme.title: Indiscretion of an American Wife
programme.desc: A Philadelphian (Jennifer Jones) says goodbye to her Italian lover (Montgomery Clift) at the train station in Rome. Starring Jennifer Jones, Montgomery Clift, Gino Cervi.

programme.title: Captains Courageous
programme.desc: Portuguese fishermen pick up a rich mans son (Freddie Bartholomew) who has fallen overboard. Starring Spencer Tracy, Freddie Bartholomew, Lionel Barrymore.

programme.title: One Way Passage
programme.desc: A condemned man (William Powell) and dying woman (Kay Francis) fall in love on a ship from Hong Kong to San Francisco. Starring William Powell, Kay Francis, Frank McHugh.

programme.title: Romance on the High Seas
programme.desc: A man (Don DeFore) hires a private eye (Jack Carson) to watch his wife (Janis Paige) on a cruise, but the wife sends an impostor. Starring Jack Carson, Janis Paige, Don DeFore.

programme.title: Now, Voyager
programme.desc: A Boston spinster (Bette Davis) finds a lover (Paul Henreid) after the counsel of a kind psychiatrist (Claude Rains) brings her out of her frumpy shell. Starring Bette Davis, Claude Rains, Paul Henreid.

programme.title: The Last Voyage
programme.desc: Troubles aboard a captains (George Sanders) sinking liner include a mans (Robert Stack) wife (Dorothy Malone) trapped with her head above water. Starring Robert Stack, Dorothy Malone, George Sanders.

programme.title: Billy Budd
programme.desc: Melvilles sailor hero (Terence Stamp) opposes Claggart (Robert Ryan), the cruel master-at-arms. Starring Robert Ryan, Terence Stamp, Melvyn Douglas.

programme.title: Mutiny on the Bounty
programme.desc: First mate Mr. Christian (Clark Gable) and his 18th-century shipmates overthrow cruel Capt. Bligh (Charles Laughton) and set him adrift in the Pacific. Starring Charles Laughton, Clark Gable, Franchot Tone.

programme.title: 12 Angry Men
programme.desc: One (Henry Fonda) of 12 jurors holds out in the case of a boy from the slums who is accused of killing his father. Starring Henry Fonda, Lee J. Cobb, Ed Begley.

programme.title: Witness for the Prosecution
programme.desc: An aging barrister (Charles Laughton) defends a man (Tyrone Power) for murder despite damaging testimony from the accuseds wife (Marlene Dietrich). Starring Tyrone Power, Marlene Dietrich, Charles Laughton.

programme.title: Judgment at Nuremberg
programme.desc: Stanley Kramers Oscar-winning account reveals postwar courtroom proceedings against Nazi war criminals in 1948 Germany. Starring Spencer Tracy, Burt Lancaster, Richard Widmark.

programme.title: Adams Rib
programme.desc: Married lawyers (Spencer Tracy, Katharine Hepburn) clash in and out of court over a womans (Judy Holliday) right to shoot her husband and his lover. Starring Spencer Tracy, Katharine Hepburn, Judy Holliday.

programme.title: Cimarron
programme.desc: Husband-and-wife homesteaders (Richard Dix, Irene Dunne) join the Oklahoma land rush of 1889 and stay on to build an empire. Starring Richard Dix, Irene Dunne, Estelle Taylor.

programme.title: How the West Was Won
programme.desc: The history of 19th-century Western expansion, as seen through the lives of three generations of a pioneer family. Starring Carroll Baker, Lee J. Cobb, Henry Fonda.

programme.title: Calamity Jane
programme.desc: Wild West sharpshooter Jane (Doris Day) falls for Wild Bill Hickok (Howard Keel) and tries to act more ladylike. Starring Doris Day, Howard Keel, Allyn Ann McLerie.

programme.title: Stagecoach
programme.desc: An outlaw (John Wayne), a prostitute (Claire Trevor), a drunken doctor and assorted others go through Indian country. Starring John Wayne, Claire Trevor, Andy Devine.

programme.title: Red River
programme.desc: A cattle baron (John Wayne) fights with his foster son (Montgomery Clift) on the first cattle drive up the Chisholm Trail. Starring John Wayne, Montgomery Clift, Walter Brennan.

programme.title: The Naked Spur
programme.desc: A bounty hunter (James Stewart) has competition for an outlaws daughter (Janet Leigh) and a cornered killer (Robert Ryan). Starring James Stewart, Janet Leigh, Robert Ryan.

programme.title: Broken Arrow
programme.desc: A lone frontiersman (James Stewart) risks his life to forge peace between Arizona settlers and Cochises (Jeff Chandler) Apache nation. Starring James Stewart, Jeff Chandler, Debra Paget.

programme.title: Shane
programme.desc: An ex-gunfighter (Alan Ladd) sides with Wyoming homesteaders (Jean Arthur, Van Heflin) against a ruthless cattle baron. Starring Alan Ladd, Jean Arthur, Van Heflin.

programme.title: Hondo
programme.desc: An Indian scout attempts to escort a homesteaders wife and her son back to safety after her husband deserts her during an Apache attack. When she refuses to go, he stays on to help and, over time, forms a strong bond with both her and her son. Starring John Wayne, Geraldine Page, Ward Bond.

programme.title: McCabe and Mrs. Miller
programme.desc: A frontier gambler (Warren Beatty) and a madam (Julie Christie) protect their booming business from outside investors. Starring Warren Beatty, Julie Christie, Rene Auberjonois.

programme.title: The Wild Bunch
programme.desc: An outlaw (William Holden) and his gang, on the run from the Mexican Army and bounty hunters, plot to rob a United States Army train. Starring William Holden, Ernest Borgnine, Robert Ryan.

programme.title: Billy the Kid
programme.desc: The Wild West outlaw (Robert Taylor) rides into town and faces a childhood friend turned territorial marshal (Brian Donlevy). Starring Robert Taylor, Brian Donlevy, Ian Hunter.

programme.title: Hollywood Canteen
programme.desc: A GI (Robert Hutton) back from the South Pacific wins a canteen raffle and meets his dream girl (Joan Leslie), as Warner Bros. stars perform. Starring Robert Hutton, Joan Leslie, Dane Clark.

programme.title: Flying Down to Rio
programme.desc: A bandleader (Gene Raymond) woos a Latin flame (Dolores del Río) who is already engaged to his employer. The film features the first screen pairing of Fred Astaire and Ginger Rogers. Starring Dolores del Río, Gene Raymond, Raul Roulien.

programme.title: Born to Dance
programme.desc: A tap-dancing understudy (Eleanor Powell) meets a sailor (James Stewart) on leave and replaces the star (Virginia Bruce) of a show. Starring Eleanor Powell, James Stewart, Virginia Bruce.

programme.title: Swing Time
programme.desc: Gambler/dancer Lucky (Fred Astaire) falls for dance teacher Penny (Ginger Rogers) while engaged to Margaret. Starring Fred Astaire, Ginger Rogers, Victor Moore.

programme.title: Royal Wedding
programme.desc: A brother (Fred Astaire) and sister (Jane Powell) take their act to 1947 London. Includes Astaires famous dance on the ceiling. Starring Fred Astaire, Jane Powell, Peter Lawford.

programme.title: The Band Wagon
programme.desc: Two playwrights bring a movie dancer (Fred Astaire) to New York for a Broadway show with a ballerina (Cyd Charisse). Starring Fred Astaire, Cyd Charisse, Oscar Levant.

programme.title: Seven Brides for Seven Brothers
programme.desc: When an Oregon trapper decides to marry, his six rowdy brothers aim to follow suit, though not one has a sweetheart yet. Starring Howard Keel, Jane Powell, Russ Tamblyn.

programme.title: West Side Story
programme.desc: Against a backdrop of vicious gang warfare between the New Yorker Jets and the Puerto Rican Sharks, a romance develops across rival lines. 1960s update of "Romeo and Juliet", with amazing song and dance sequences. Starring Natalie Wood, Richard Beymer, Russ Tamblyn.

programme.title: All That Jazz
programme.desc: A Broadway choreographer (Roy Scheider) chain-smokes, pops pills and overworks his way to open-heart surgery. Starring Roy Scheider, Jessica Lange, Ann Reinking.

programme.title: The Red Shoes
programme.desc: A ballerina (Moira Shearer) loves a ballet composer (Marius Goring) but dances for an obsessive impresario (Anton Walbrook). Starring Moira Shearer, Anton Walbrook, Marius Goring.

programme.title: The Nature of Things
programme.desc: The accidental discovery in Alberta of one of the best-preserved dinosaurs opens a prehistoric cold case to uncover the secrets of its mysterious death.

programme.title: So You Want To Be a Muslim
programme.desc: Five North American individuals experience life in new and often unexpected ways when they choose to become Muslim.

programme.desc: Richard Ayoade visits Russias cultural and actual capital with comedian Rob Beckett.

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours in...
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade and Aisling Bea explore the capital of Budapest; the duo samples the national dish of goulash and sifts through mismatched finds in the flea market.

programme.title: A Husband to Die For: The Lisa Aguilar Story
programme.desc: Attacked and left for dead, a pregnant woman starts to suspect that her own husband may be the culprit. With help from family and a determined legal team, she embarks on a courageous journey to protect her child, seek justice, and rebuild her life. Starring Keana Lyn, Jon McLaren, Marilu Henner.

programme.title: How Not to Hire a Hitman

programme.title: Transformers One (2024)
programme.desc: Brothers-in-arms Orion Pax and D-16 become sworn enemies Optimus Prime and Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers (2007)
programme.desc: An ancient struggle between two Cybertronian races, the heroic Autobots and the evil Decepticons, comes to Earth, with a clue to the ultimate power held by a teenager.

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen (2009)
programme.desc: Sam Witwicky leaves the Autobots behind for a normal life. But when his mind is filled with cryptic symbols, the Decepticons target him, and he is dragged back into the Transformers war.

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon (2011)
programme.desc: Sam Witwicky and his new girlfriend, Carly, join the fray when the evil Decepticons renew their longstanding war against the Autobots. The war appears to tip in favor of the Decepticons, leading to a climactic battle in Chicago.

programme.title: Eagle Eye (2008)
programme.desc: Two strangers (Shia LaBeouf, Michelle Monaghan) become pawns of a mysterious woman who threatens their friends and family and uses technology to control their actions.

programme.title: Fight or Flight (2024)
programme.desc: A mercenary takes on the job of tracking a high-value asset known only as "The Ghost" on an international flight. Realizing the plane is filled with assassins assigned to kill them both, the pair must work together in a fight for their lives.

programme.title: Old Guy (2024)
programme.desc: An aging hit man must train a young prodigy when his employer moves to replace the old guard. However, when they learn theyre being betrayed, the unlikely pair turns into a lethal team -- with their double-crossing bosses in their sights.

programme.title: Scream 4 (2011)
programme.desc: The Ghostface Killer returns with a vengeance when self-help author Sidney Prescott arrives in Woodsboro on the last stop of her book tour.

programme.title: The Yards (2000)
programme.desc: A friends lure of easy money draws an ex-con into the corrupt world of his uncles subway-train business.

programme.title: The Killer Inside Me (2010)
programme.desc: An encounter with an aggressive prostitute (Jessica Alba) brings a Texas lawmans (Casey Affleck) homicidal tendencies screaming to the surface.

programme.title: Camp X-Ray (2014)
programme.desc: A female guard at Guantánamo Bay forms an unlikely friendship with one of the facilitys longtime detainees.

programme.title: Captive (2015)
programme.desc: Recovering drug addict Ashley Smith (Kate Mara) reads Rick Warrens "The Purpose Driven Life" as armed fugitive Brian Nichols (David Oyelowo) holds her hostage in her apartment.

programme.title: The Survivalist (2021)
programme.desc: A year and a half after the fall of civilization due to a viral outbreak, a former FBI agent is forced to protect a young woman immune to the disease from a dangerous gang leader hunting her.

programme.title: The Bye Bye Man (2017)
programme.desc: A couple (Douglas Smith, Cressida Bonas) and their friend (Lucien Laviscount) stumble upon the horrific origins of the Bye Bye Man (Doug Jones), a mysterious figure that they discover is the root cause of the evil behind the most unspeakable acts.

programme.title: Dont Knock Twice (2016)
programme.desc: A mother looking to reconnect with her estranged daughter attracts the attention of a demonic witch.

programme.title: Kindred (2025)
programme.desc: A pair of twisted, young criminals decide to break into a mansion for one big score, but they soon find out that the owners of the house are much more dangerous than they are.

programme.title: Switchback (1997)
programme.desc: A college student (Jared Leto) and a former rail worker (Danny Glover) are suspects in an FBI agents (Dennis Quaid) hunt for a serial killer who abducted his son.

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October (1990)
programme.desc: Moscow, Washington and a CIA analyst (Alec Baldwin) track a renegade Soviet captain (Sean Connery) and his new submarine.

programme.title: The Contractor (2022)
programme.desc: When his new assignment goes awry, an elite soldier finds himself hunted and on the run, caught in a dangerous conspiracy and fighting to stay alive long enough to get home and uncover the true motives of those who betrayed him.

programme.title: Serpico (1973)
programme.desc: Based on the true story of Frank Serpico, who sacrificed his career to expose widespread corruption in the NYPD.

programme.title: No Country for Old Men (2007)
programme.desc: An aging lawman (Tommy Lee Jones) reflects on his past and laments a changing world while trying to find and protect a hunter who took the cash from a drug deal gone bad.

programme.title: Changing Lanes (2002)
programme.desc: An attorney and a recovering alcoholic have a car accident which swiftly escalates into an ongoing, bitter feud.

programme.title: Sleeping Dogs (2024)
programme.desc: Suffering from memory loss, a former homicide detective tries to solve a brutal murder that he cant recall. As he pieces together evidence from a decade-old investigation, he soon uncovers a sinister web of buried secrets tied to his forgotten past.

programme.title: The Salvation (2014)
programme.desc: After shooting the man who murdered his wife, a Danish settler (Mads Mikkelsen) incurs the wrath of the mans brother (Jeffrey Dean Morgan), a ruthless land baron who rules their frontier town.

programme.title: The Last Stop in Yuma County (2023)
programme.sub-title: The Last Stop in Yuma County (2023)
programme.desc: Stranded at an Arizona rest stop, a traveling knife salesman gets thrust into a high-stakes hostage situation by the arrival of two bank robbers who will stop at nothing to protect their ill-begotten fortune.

programme.title: The Outlaws (2024)
programme.desc: A group of outlaws awaken to their empty train heist bag. Interrogations begin as each cowboy becomes the focus in an attempt to unmask the thief among them. Tensions mount as each bandit struggles to clear their name before bullets fly.

programme.title: Top Gun: Maverick (2022)
programme.desc: Pete "Maverick" Mitchell keeps pushing the envelope after years of service as one of the Navys top aviators. He must soon confront the past while training a new squad of graduates for a dangerous mission that demands the ultimate sacrifice.

programme.title: The Godfather (1972)
programme.desc: Crime boss Vito Corleone and his sons, the ruthless yet loyal members of the Corleone family, rule their secretive New York empire with an iron fist.

programme.title: The Godfather, Part II (1974)
programme.desc: Michael Corleone (Al Pacino) rules his fathers criminal empire, while flashbacks recall young Vitos (Robert De Niro) climb to power.

programme.title: Bounce (2000)
programme.desc: An ad executive (Ben Affleck) seeks out the widow (Gwyneth Paltrow) of a stranger who swapped tickets with him before boarding an ill-fated flight.

programme.title: Jersey Girl (2004)
programme.desc: A young woman (Liv Tyler) changes the life of a single father (Ben Affleck) who used to be a successful New York music publicist.

programme.title: The Reader (2008)
programme.desc: In postwar Germany, a teenager (David Kross) has a love affair with an older woman (Kate Winslet) who is hiding a terrible secret.

programme.title: Ask the Dust (2006)
programme.desc: In Depression-era Los Angeles, a fiery Mexican waitress (Salma Hayek) who wants to improve her lot through marriage meets an aspiring writer (Colin Farrell) of Italian descent.

programme.title: The Beldham (2024)
programme.desc: A struggling new mother fights a generations-old presence lurking within her familys home, threatening her safety, her sanity, and the life of her infant child.

programme.title: Election (1999)
programme.desc: Tracy faces no competition in her high school election, but the civics teacher intervenes by encouraging the varsity football player to run for president, resulting in chaos.

programme.title: Sixteen Candles (1984)
programme.desc: A girl turning 16 likes another girls guy (Michael Schoeffling) and feels nobody cares about her birthday.

programme.title: Flashdance (1983)
programme.desc: A Pittsburgh welder works days, dances in a bar at night, dates her boss and chases the dream of acceptance into a prestigious ballet school.

programme.title: Shes All That (1999)
programme.desc: A cool teen (Freddie Prinze Jr.) bets a friend that he can transform the schools geekiest girl (Rachael Leigh Cook) into a prom queen.

programme.title: Bridget Joness Diary (2001)
programme.desc: An outrageous British woman (Renee Zellweger) decides to take control of her life, but instead falls for two very different men (Colin Firth, Hugh Grant).

programme.title: No Strings Attached (2011)
programme.desc: After sex enters the equation, two lifelong friends (Natalie Portman, Ashton Kutcher) make a pact to keep their relationship purely physical.

programme.title: Eagle vs. Shark (2007)
programme.desc: A socially awkward fast-food waitress (Loren Horsley) flips over a video-game clerk (Jemaine Clement), who is busy plotting revenge on a bully from his past.

programme.title: The Virgin Suicides (1999)
programme.desc: Men reminisce about intriguing sisters, whose parents (James Woods, Kathleen Turner) quarantined them after one of the five killed herself.

programme.title: Would You Rather (2012)
programme.desc: Iris (Brittany Snow) and seven other desperate people become trapped in Shepards (Jeffrey Combs) mansion. Shepard forces them to play a sadistic game for a large sum of money -- but the dilemmas become increasingly deadly.

programme.title: Personal Shopper (2016)
programme.desc: A young American in Paris works as a personal shopper for a celebrity. She seems to have the ability to communicate with spirits, like her recently deceased twin brother. Soon, she starts to receive ambiguous messages from an unknown source.

programme.title: Shell (2024)
programme.desc: Desperate to reclaim her career, once-beloved actress Samantha Lake gets drawn into the glamorous world of wellness mogul Zoe Shannon, only to uncover a monstrous truth beneath the seemingly flawless surface.

programme.title: Sound of Violence (2021)
programme.desc: A young killer experiences intense pleasure whenever she hears the sound of human pain.

programme.title: Bottom of the 9th (2019)
programme.desc: After serving 17 years in prison for a violent mistake he made in his youth, a once-aspiring baseball player returns to his Bronx neighborhood.

programme.title: Win a Date With Tad Hamilton! (2004)
programme.sub-title: Win a Date With Tad Hamilton! (2004)
programme.desc: Secretly in love with his friend (Kate Bosworth), a supermarket manager (Topher Grace) becomes jealous when she meets a famous actor (Josh Duhamel).

programme.title: Roman Holiday (1953)
programme.desc: A young princess (Audrey Hepburn), tired of her constraints, runs off with a U.S. newsman (Gregory Peck) in Rome.

programme.title: Boys and Girls (2000)
programme.desc: Two longtime friends (Freddie Prinze Jr., Claire Forlani), each with a string of failed romances, wonder if they should date each other.

programme.title: Bride and Prejudice (2004)
programme.desc: Mrs Bakshi is looking for suitable husbands for her daughters. When the rich single gents Balraj and Darcy visit, the Bakshis have high hopes, but circumstances get in the way of romance.

programme.title: Queen of the Desert (2015)
programme.desc: Gertrude Bells life as an explorer, cartographer, and archaeologist for the British Empire.

programme.title: Queen Bees (2021)
programme.desc: While her house undergoes repairs, fiercely independent senior Helen temporarily moves into a nearby retirement community, where she encounters lusty widows, cutthroat bridge tournaments and a hotbed of bullying "mean girls."

programme.title: Mothers Day (2016)
programme.desc: As Mothers Day draws near, a single mom (Jennifer Aniston) learns that her ex-husband (Timothy Olyphant) is marrying a younger woman (Shay Mitchell), while a recently widowed man (Jason Sudeikis) struggles to raise his two daughters.

programme.title: The Edge of Seventeen (2016)
programme.desc: A high school junior (Hailee Steinfeld) develops an unexpected bond with a thoughtful teen (Hayden Szeto) after learning that her best friend (Haley Lu Richardson) is dating her older brother (Blake Jenner).

programme.title: Save the Last Dance (2001)
programme.desc: A white teenager (Julia Stiles) moves to Chicago after her mothers death and falls for a black student (Sean Patrick Thomas) who shares her love of dance.
